title: Accounts Cum Admin Assistant
description:
Horizon Shipmanagement is seeking a detail-oriented, responsible, and proactive Accounts Cum Admin Assistant to support our finance and administrative operations. The ideal candidate will assist the Accounts Executive/Manager in day-to-day accounting functions while also providing essential administrative support to ensure smooth office and vessel-related workflows.

Key Responsibilities

Accounting Responsibilities

  • Assist in daily bookkeeping, data entry, and maintaining accurate financial records.
  • Handle Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable, including invoice verification, vendor payment preparation, and billing.
  • Prepare petty cash records, and expense claims.
  • Support monthly closing activities and preparation of financial reports.
  • Maintain vessel-related accounting files, crew payroll summaries, various invoices.
  • Assist in liaising with auditors, banks, vendors, and service providers as required.
  • Ensure all financial documents are properly filed, organized, and archived.

Administrative Responsibilities

  • Provide general administrative support to the office, including correspondence, filing, scheduling, and document management.
  • Assist in coordinating personnel trainings, and personnel files.
  • Handle office procurement, stationery supplies, and vendor coordination.
  • Support HR and Operations departments in preparing letters, forms, reports, and logistics arrangements when required.
  • Assists in generating quotations to clients.
  • Maintain records related to vessel operations, certificates, contracts, and compliance documents.
  • Assist in arranging travel bookings, visas, and accommodation for crew or staff when needed.
  • Ensure visitors and stakeholders are attended to professionally.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Certificate in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field.
  • 1–3 years of relevant accounting and/or administrative experience (experience in maritime industry is an advantage).
  • Proficient in MS Office (Excel, Word) and accounting software (Xero).
  • Basic understanding of bookkeeping principles.
  • Strong attention to detail and good organisational abilities.
  • Able to multitask, work independently, and meet deadlines.
  • Good communication skills in English and preferably Mandarin (written & spoken).
  • Positive attitude, integrity, and willingness to learn.

postedCompany.description:
Horizon Shipmanagement Pte. Ltd. is a professional and forward-looking maritime service provider committed to delivering safe, reliable, and efficient ship management solutions. Headquartered in Singapore, the global hub of maritime excellence, Horizon Ship Management provides comprehensive technical management, crewing, compliance, and offshore support services to owners and operators across the region.

At Horizon, we believe that people are the core of every successful maritime operation. Our team consists of dedicated marine professionals, experienced seafarers, and technical specialists who work together to uphold the highest standards of safety, operational integrity, and regulatory compliance. We manage a diverse fleet that includes offshore support vessels, AHTS, construction barges, DP-classed units, and specialised project vessels—each supported by robust Safety Management Systems aligned with international and flag-state requirements.

By combining operational expertise with a strong QHSE culture, Horizon Shipmanagement ensures that every vessel under our care performs safely, efficiently, and sustainably. Our commitment to continuous training, competency development, and career progression provides our seafarers and shore staff with a supportive environment to grow professionally.

As we continue to expand our fleet and operations, Horizon Ship Management is seeking motivated, skilled, and safety-focused individuals to join our team. Whether at sea or ashore, you will be part of a company that values professionalism, integrity, teamwork, and operational excellence.
postedCompany.name: HORIZON SHIPMANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
